about.body_1: This hackathon decision-support prototype is built for public electricity awareness. It combines RTE/ODRE electricity observations, EcoWatt context, weather features, and transparent fallbacks to explain demand, generation, exchange, and pressure separately.
about.body_2: Limitations: this is not an RTE operational forecast, tariff signal, dispatch tool, or verified carbon accounting method. Historical sample data is separated from live operational context.
about.title: About the project

delayed_source_data.body: The current-state API marks the latest source record as delayed.
delayed_source_data.title: Delayed source data

demo_fixture_mode.body: This is contract-valid historical sample data and must not be read as live operations.
demo_fixture_mode.title: Demo fixture mode

partial_data.body: {count} field(s) are unavailable and labelled in the typed contract.
partial_data.title: Partial data

stale_data.body: The latest typed contract marks this data as stale.
stale_data.title: Stale data

typed_twin_contract_unavailable.body: The page is using the legacy public context while the typed response is unavailable.
typed_twin_contract_unavailable.title: Typed twin contract unavailable

using_last_known_good_data.body: Live refresh did not provide a fresh complete source bundle.
using_last_known_good_data.title: Using last-known-good data

definition.fallback: Fallback route used because preferred data was unavailable.
definition.model: Model estimate from the Energy Pulse analytical layer.
definition.modelled: App balance context from the analytical layer.
definition.official: Official public source or official forecast.
definition.replay: Historical replay or demo fixture, not live data.
definition.unavailable: The source or field is unavailable and has not been replaced with zero.

loading.body: Retrieving the latest typed contract response.
loading.title: Loading data

default.definition: Domain term used by this dashboard.

likely_range.definition: The p10 to p90 forecast interval. It describes uncertainty and is not used as a balance-pressure input.
likely_range.label: likely range

local_generation.definition: Electricity generated in the selected region; the region remains part of the connected French grid.
local_generation.label: local generation

modelled_balance_context.definition: A documented analytical pressure context, separate from official EcoWatt and not an operational reserve margin.
modelled_balance_context.label: modelled balance context

usual_demand.definition: A comparable-history baseline for the same season, day type, and local hour.
usual_demand.label: usual demand
